questions.text: An [mm] PR with a proposed mental-model update was opened for this PR — review and decide on it (merge or close), then comment /mm-answer mm-pr: <decided> to continue.

rationale: PR #7 changes the mental model because sustained client-observed URMA data-plane failure now drives worker selection independently of worker liveness: the diff adds UrmaSuccessRateTracker, configurable success-rate/min-sample gates, async URMA_DATA_PLANE_FAILURE switching, and keep-current-worker behavior during failover.
